languages.text: "Хотя силы Гапраков уничтожены, а отпрыск ликвидирован, на заставе некто представился этой фамилией. Выживший родич? Обманщи{mf|к|ца}? Я разберусь". {n}Искаженный помехами голос становится тише.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Хотя силы Гапраков уничтожены, а отпрыск ликвидирован, на заставе некто представился этой фамилией. Выживший родич? Обманщи{mf|к|ца}? Я разберусь". {n}Искаженный помехами голос становится тише.{/n}

languages.text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Хотя силы Гапраков уничтожены, а отпрыск ликвидирован, на заставе некто представился этой фамилией. Выживший родич? Обманщи{mf|к|ца}? Я разберусь". {n}Искаженный помехами голос становится тише.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

"The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

"The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

languages.text: “贾帕克家的军队已被消灭，子嗣也被解决，但有个自称是贾帕克家的人出现在前哨。是幸存的血亲？还是冒名顶替者？我会去处理的。”{n}信号干扰让那声音逐渐变得微弱。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家的军队已被消灭，子嗣也被解决，但有个自称是贾帕克家的人出现在前哨。是幸存的血亲？还是冒名顶替者？我会去处理的。”{n}信号干扰让那声音逐渐变得微弱。{/n}

languages.text: « Les troupes des Gaprak ont été anéanties et l'héritier est mort, mais une personne disant appartenir à cette maison s'est présentée à l'avant-poste. {mf|Un parent survivant|Une parente survivante} ? {mf|Un imposteur |Une impostrice}? Dans tous les cas, je vais m'en charger. » {n}Le rapport continue, mais les grésillements le rendent à peine audible.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Les troupes des Gaprak ont été anéanties et l'héritier est mort, mais une personne disant appartenir à cette maison s'est présentée à l'avant-poste. {mf|Un parent survivant|Une parente survivante} ? {mf|Un imposteur |Une impostrice}? Dans tous les cas, je vais m'en charger. » {n}Le rapport continue, mais les grésillements le rendent à peine audible.{/n}

languages.text: "Gaprak kuvvetleri yok edildi, vâris ortadan kaldırıldı. Ancak karakolda kendini Gaprak olarak tanıtan biri ortaya çıktı. Sağ akrabalarından biri mi? Yoksa sahtekâr mı? Ben ilgileneceğim." {n}Parazitten dolayı bozulan ses, daha da kısılıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak kuvvetleri yok edildi, vâris ortadan kaldırıldı. Ancak karakolda kendini Gaprak olarak tanıtan biri ortaya çıktı. Sağ akrabalarından biri mi? Yoksa sahtekâr mı? Ben ilgileneceğim." {n}Parazitten dolayı bozulan ses, daha da kısılıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Las fuerzas de Gaprak han sido destruidas, y el heredero, eliminado, pero alguien que afirmaba ser Gaprak se ha presentado en el puesto avanzado. ¿Sería un{mf||a} pariente superviviente? ¿Un{mf||a} impostor{mf||a}? Me ocuparé de ello». {n}Distorsionada por la interferencia, la voz se vuelve más callada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Las fuerzas de Gaprak han sido destruidas, y el heredero, eliminado, pero alguien que afirmaba ser Gaprak se ha presentado en el puesto avanzado. ¿Sería un{mf||a} pariente superviviente? ¿Un{mf||a} impostor{mf||a}? Me ocuparé de ello». {n}Distorsionada por la interferencia, la voz se vuelve más callada.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Truppen der Gaprak wurden zerstört, der Erbe eliminiert, aber am Außenposten hat sich jemand als Gaprak ausgegeben. Ein überlebender Verwandter? Ein Hochstapler? Ich werde mich darum kümmern." {n}Die durch Interferenzen verzerrte Stimme wird leiser.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Truppen der Gaprak wurden zerstört, der Erbe eliminiert, aber am Außenposten hat sich jemand als Gaprak ausgegeben. Ein überlebender Verwandter? Ein Hochstapler? Ich werde mich darum kümmern." {n}Die durch Interferenzen verzerrte Stimme wird leiser.{/n}

languages.text: 「ギャプラクの軍勢は壊滅し、その血筋は絶たれた。だが、ギャプラクを名乗る者が要塞に現れた。生き残った親族か、それとも偽物か。私は対処する。」{n}通信の妨害により、声が途切れ途切れに聞こえる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak forces have been destroyed and the scion eliminated, but someone claiming to be a Gaprak presented themselves at the outpost. A surviving relative? An impostor? I'll deal with it." {n}Distorted by interference, the voice grows quieter.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラクの軍勢は壊滅し、その血筋は絶たれた。だが、ギャプラクを名乗る者が要塞に現れた。生き残った親族か、それとも偽物か。私は対処する。」{n}通信の妨害により、声が途切れ途切れに聞こえる。{/n}
